sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for Tier 2 game

special_mechanics.name: Possession/Haunting
special_mechanics.description: Polterguy can possess household objects marked with 'Fright 'ems' (colored indicators) to scare family members. Movement restricted to object interaction rather than free platforming.

special_mechanics.name: Floating/Ghostly Movement
special_mechanics.description: Green Fright 'ems allow Polterguy to control and float around possessed objects (ghostly heads, toy airplanes, severed hands) using D-pad navigation

special_mechanics.name: Underworld Navigation
special_mechanics.description: In recovery stages, Polterguy navigates dungeon paths to collect ecto drops. Health system with portrait indicator that depletes on damage from bats, bouncing skulls, and disembodied hands.

tier_notes: Tier 2 empirical/qualitative: Game is action-based but movement physics are not primary design focus. Player controls ghost character through object possession mechanics rather than direct platforming. No quantitative physics parameters documented in available sources.
